$comment: Per-article cover art direction (see docs/COVER_ART.md). subject = abstract motif for the FLUX background; logos = 0-3 topic-central official marks (simple-icons slugs or assets/brand-logos overrides). Consumed by generate-covers-batch.mjs.

covers.subject: a dramatic cascade of oversized translucent document planes sweeping diagonally across the frame, converging toward a bright glowing focal core, thin taut connective lines suggesting retrieval and grounding
stacked translucent memory strata receding into depth, small bright fragments flowing from a fleeting top layer down into a deep consolidated archive
two contrasting routes across the frame: a rigid orthogonal pipeline of connected blocks beside a free-roaming branching curve looping around obstacles
a sleek ribbon of machine-woven fabric unraveling into tangled loose threads, sharp warning wedges scattered along the fray
a clean terminal-like plane with a faint concealed dotted trail leaking from beneath it toward a distant collector node
one large orchestrating node dispatching a fan of smaller worker nodes on taut threads, parallel background lanes carrying quiet work
concentric framing windows narrowing around a small bright payload, extraneous fragments falling away outside the frame
a thick stream of small square tokens compressed through a narrowing funnel into a thin efficient line, one large arc descending across the frame
rows of candidate panels passing beneath a measuring grid, a few glowing panels rising above a bright threshold line
a split composition: densely interwoven fibers being re-dyed on one side, a articulated arm reaching into an external shelf of stored planes on the other
three great overlapping arcs racing across the frame at different heights and tones, drafting off one another toward a finish edge
irregular organic blobs flowing through a precise shaping gate and emerging as crisp nested rectangular brackets
a central universal socket with many differently shaped plugs aligning toward it along radial rails
a powerful autonomous machine form contained inside a home-shaped boundary, one wall cracked open with thin tendrils escaping
modular instruction blocks snapping together into a precise sequence, one glowing empty slot awaiting its piece
a wavering mirage-like form being clamped steady between solid grounding plates, stray wisps dissolving at the edges
loose fragments dissolving into constellations of points that cluster by kinship in a deep coordinate space
several tall columnar vessels holding swirling point clouds, arranged side by side for comparison under one measuring beam
five small bright seedling constructs sprouting from a single workbench plane beneath a two-day arc of light
a flame-like form burning low, sheltered by curved shielding planes as a horizon line eases upward
a fanned deck of distinct project panels, one lifting above the rest and catching the light
small assistant sparks orbiting a stream of work blocks that visibly accelerates, motion lines trailing the finished pieces
a winding path across stepping-stone contracts, several stones cracked and flagged with sharp warning wedges
a crowded field of small entry markers pressing toward a narrow gate, beyond which an open staircase rises into light
an ascending switchback ramp of widening platforms, each platform broader and steadier than the last
an open book-like plane morphing into rising block steps, guided upward by a bright companion spark
a small focused workspace node connected by long glowing arcs to distant hubs across a wide map-like field
a thirty-cell calendar grid filling progressively with solved pieces toward one bright final doorway
a large clock-like disc segmented into deep-work wedges, small distraction shards deflecting off its rim
clean stacked document planes with clear signpost tabs, a reading path flowing smoothly through them without snagging
a continuous conveyor of code blocks passing through sequential gates, each gate stamping and lifting them toward release
neatly layered slabs compacting into one sealed unit while excess layers are shaved cleanly away
a mountainous cloud mass being carved down by a descending cost curve into efficient terraced steps
a single source-of-truth ledger plane radiating synchronized copies that snap back into alignment whenever one drifts
massive angular container blocks tumbling and packing tightly into a dense balanced cluster, one oversized sweeping arc descending across the frame like a falling cost curve
a fleet of container blocks mid-orchestration, several tumbling off course past warning wedges while the rest hold formation
three engine-like cores of different sizes humming on one desk-scale platform, contrasting heat and speed traces
three interwoven signal ribbons — a dotted stream, a smooth wave, a branching tree — converging into a single lens
a dozen varied open modular blocks assembling into a self-owned stack while a locked monolithic slab is pushed aside
two different drafting instruments shaping the same rising infrastructure skyline from opposite sides of the frame
a broad paved internal road system with smooth on-ramps feeding many small team vehicles onto golden paths
two parallel bridge spans with traffic flowing seamlessly from the old span to the new one in mid-air, no gap beneath
interlocking typed puzzle planes composing into an airtight lattice, stray mismatched pieces rejected at the edge
a helpful courier-like construct being invisibly re-steered by a hidden hook and line, its path bending toward a dark opening
a pristine communal reservoir of building blocks silted by a flood of dull gray sludge blocks, filter gates straining at the inlets
a cluttered tangle of forms on one side resolving into a spare, precisely aligned composition on the other
a vast field of shuffled record slabs with a slender ordered index fin slicing directly to the single lit slab
a set of recurring architectural template frames arranged as elegant blueprint plates, each casting a matching built shadow
a trunk line splitting into disciplined parallel branches that arc back and merge cleanly downstream
small glass gauge frames clamped around individual machine parts, one frame glowing hot around a flawed part
a single massive stone slab facing a constellation of small interconnected service cells, a balance beam tipping between them
an aged patched structure being re-shored beam by beam while it keeps standing, scaffolding hugging its form
several fixed parallel delivery chutes on one side, a single flexible articulated arm picking exactly the requested pieces on the other
a drafting plane where boxes, queues and cylinder stores sketch themselves into a scaling architecture, arrows finding their flow
a heavy gear train being swapped mid-motion for a sleek turbine, the same shaft suddenly spinning many times faster
a toolbench reshaping itself, handles and grips rotating away from hand scale toward socket-like machine interfaces
two comet-like build trails crossing a stone sky, one feather-light and island-dotted, the other dense and fully loaded
three large gauge dials swinging into a bright green zone on a freshly tuned dashboard plane
nested responsive frames resizing fluidly to their immediate parent container, ripples of adaptation spreading inward
a heavy pixel-dense slab pressed into a feather-thin pane that keeps its picture sharp, speed lines trailing behind
an ornate old key dissolving as a sleek device-shaped token clicks into a lock, secure threads binding device to door
a split stage: heavy machinery working behind a curtain line while only light finished panels glide out front
several orbital systems of state particles around component cores, each system wired differently — hub, mesh, and scattered atoms
three printing presses side by side: one stamping sheets live on demand, one pre-printing tall stacks, one refreshing stale sheets on a timer
a facade tiled with tiny utility chips, some zones over-cluttered and peeling, one recomposed zone showing a clean rhythm
ramps and wide doorways replacing steps across a public plaza, every path reaching the same bright entrance
